parameters.content:
## Notify Admin – Contact Query
Sends an email to each assistant in the members list when a user submits a support / contact query.
Expects: { notification_id, members: [{ first_name, last_name, phone, email }], participant_details: { name, email, phone, contact_input, query_text, ticket_id, participant_user_id } }

Each member.email is used as the email recipient (to). Query / user details come from participant_details.
